role_summary: the cre dit analyst evaluates creditworthiness of borrowers and supports lending decisions  through financial and risk analysis.
responsibilities: • analyze financial statements and cash flows of borrowers   • assess credit risk and repayment capacity   • prepare credit appraisal and sanction notes   • monitor loan accounts and covenant compliance   • conduct industry and borrower risk analysis   • support credit committees and management
qualifications: • ca with strong financial analysis skills   • knowledge of lending products and credit risk   • analytical and decision -support capability
